source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for quiet productivity UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for headings, body, labels, and numerals.
layout: Layered mist bands, soft focus panels, minimal navigation, subdued dashboards, and low-contrast working grids.

prompts.label: Transparent fog motif source
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a fog layers motif with pearl grey mist, pine green valley hints, soft blue distance, and calm atmospheric bands, isolated full subject, no text.
Subject: A compact layered fog bank with translucent mist sheets, faint pine silhouettes, soft blue valley depth, and gentle horizontal forms.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the fog layers or pine hints.
Lighting/mood: muted morning light, quiet productivity-system mood, low-noise natural contrast.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be uniform with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no buildings, no people, no bright sunset, no text, no watermark, no decorative background.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Fog" derived from the visible transparent fog layers motif.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from pearl grey mist, pine green anchors, soft blue depth, and layered fog bands. This light board is the primary reference for coding any future theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board.
Required visible sections: Morphous Fog, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples with Geist and Noto Sans JP guidance.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, productivity metric cards, charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, 8px card radius, mist-layer dividers, quiet focus panels.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Fog".

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible Morphous Fog design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent fog layers motif and the visible light-mode board as references. Preserve pearl grey mist, pine green anchors, soft blue depth, layered fog texture, spacing, Japanese typography, and shadcn/tweakcn component coverage. This dark board is the companion reference for coding any future theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board.
Required visible sections: Morphous Fog, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: hidden valley background, pearl grey text, pine green primary accents, soft blue secondary accents, low-contrast mist overlays, quiet cards, crisp controls.
Constraints: no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible text, no random brand names.
